entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An annual legume crop (Arachis hypogaea L.) that is a rich source of edible oil and protein.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: An international organization mandated to develop and improve legume crops and serve as a world repository of germplasm.

entities.name: LEGUME CROPS
entities.description: A category of crops that includes groundnut.

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic resources stored in a repository, including cultivated and wild species.

entities.name: WILD ARACHIS SPECIES
entities.description: Wild relatives of the cultivated groundnut species.

entities.name: EDIBLE OIL
entities.description: A nutrient found in abundance in groundnut seeds.

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A nutrient found in abundance in groundnut seeds.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A geographical region producing 71.7% of the world groundnut production.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A geographical region producing 18.6% of the world groundnut production.
